item.title: I have happy tears. This is incredible. Many of you can now seek asylum in Canada
item.description:
Canada, fuck yeah! https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/refugees/about-refugee-system/2slgbtqi-plus.html
Update: One poster said that the US isnt specifically named. With that said, they do not mention all the countries that are included. I do not want to create false hope. Please look into it. I'm in your side. Update 2: more info https://www.rainbowrefugee.com/ Update 3: Ive been digging more into the requirements and IMO any person that meets the criteria can apply. That is my opinion based on what i have read. UPDATE 4: I made an email template with "ai" based on the requirements for asylum ( under my comment post below) I hope you send them in. Update 5: This has been enlightening. So much good discourse, minus a few obvious trolls and bots. There is no place i can find that says "no americans" on the website. ... My gut says, "Copy and send the email" No one loses. Even if Canada cant/wont help rn, they will get the message. Open discussion about what to do with American refugess in all free countries needs to start. Remember, it's been 8 weeks. There are 200 weeks left until January 20, 2029.
item.dc:creator: ProfessorDiscoSlacksandCorduroyTrousers

item.title: The Fierce one.
item.description: Do you know why Americans are angry? Over the last 50 years, real weekly wages have been stagnant. At the same time, there was a $79 trillion transfer of wealth from the bottom 90% to the top 1%. Bernie Sanders on X, 03-18-2025.

item.title: John 'Paddy' Hemingway passes at 105
item.description: A native of Dublin Ireland, Paddy was the last surviving pilot of the Battle of Britain. Thank you for defeating the Nazis of your time. Rest in Peace.
item.dc:creator: BosunMark

item.title: What Happened Today #46
item.description: ⚖️ Trump defies judges. Power grabs escalate. Resistance grows. His admin defies court orders, stacks institutions with loyalists, and cashes in on access—while federal agencies purge records and sideline workers. But cracks are showing: Judges demand answers. Progressives mobilize. The fight isn’t over. ? Sanders and AOC rally this week as pushback builds. ? Stay sharp. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → govbrief.today ? Share this. Spread the word. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://apnews.com/article/aclu-trump-deportations-el-salvador-boasberg-e447c61de031150669d01687edc4b11b 2. https://www.providencejournal.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/16/rasha-alawieh-brown-medicine-doctor-deported-lebanon-logan-airport/82478450007/ 3. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/world/trump-administration-says-south-african-ambassador-has-to-leave-the-u-s-by-friday/ar-AA1B6cMm 4. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/17/us-institute-of-peace-doge 5. https://www.wvnews.com/newsfeed/politics/top-dc-prosecutor-who-promoted-false-2020-voter-fraud-claims-forms-election-accountability-unit/article_e7a123b3-f1c0-589f-94c3-5f6d355dd0ef.html 6. https://www.billboard.com/music/music-news/semisonic-closing-time-trump-white-house-immigration-video-1235923994/ 7. https://abcnews.go.com/US/wireStory/judge-declines-force-fema-release-funds-upgrade-us-119885976 8. https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/kennedy-center-trump-envisions-remaking-001118675.html 9. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/17/social-security-trump-doge 10. https://thehill.com/policy/defense/5199551-trump-appoints-charlie-kirk-walt-nauta-michael-flynn-to-military-boards/ 11. https://www.wired.com/story/trump-million-dollar-candlelight-dinner-elon-musk/ 12. https://thehill.com/policy/energy-environment/5199408-federal-employees-return-paid-leave-court-ruling/ 13. https://abcnews.go.com/Health/hhs-appears-delete-surgeon-general-gun-violence-advisory/story?id=119887668 14. https://www.axios.com/local/salt-lake-city/2025/03/17/navajo-code-talkers-trump-dei-military-websites-wwii 15. https://www.12news.com/article/news/politics/bernie-sanders-alexandria-ocasio-cortez-arizona-fighting-oligarchy-rally/75-ef45e195-0b42-437d-9ad3-e55202a08fb7

item.title: My favorite Bible verse
item.description: 1 John 4:20 "Whoever claims to love God but hates a brother or sister is a liar. For how can you hate a brother and sister whom you have seen, and yet love God, whom you have not." Brother or sister is used pretty loosely in the new testament to mean 1. Literal brother or sister. 2. A person in the church "a brother or sister in Christ" 3. Another person in general. I choose to believe that 3 is the correct translation for this particular version. As such, I believe that people like Ben Garrett are apostates, people who have abandoned their faith and duty in exchange for fear, hate, and worldly sin. Edit: I just noticed a really interesting little tidbit. Ben refers to the snake with female pronouns, specifically saying "she hates God and his people." It's really interesting because in biblical cannon the snake and the demons use male pronouns. Looking at his Twitter this speaks to a deeper theme of distrust and dislike of women. Edit 2: I believe, with almost no evidence, that God appears to you when you die as the person you hate most in life. It is my fear that I will pass away and not see a foppish homosexual, a blue haired extremist, a Nazi, or Donald Trump, but my own eyes staring back at me. Edit 3: https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew%2025%3A31-46&version=NIV This is my second favorite Bible verse, it's the parable of the sheep and the goats. To paraphrase: Jesus says that he will not allow people like Ben to rejoice with him in eternity, and will instead throw them into fire and personally rebuke them from heaven. You must be kind, you must be empathetic, and people who believe otherwise are doomed. Edit 4 So edit 2 came from a short story I wrote where a man dies and sits down with God in a sterile room. He is expecting to speak to a large man, someone strong and powerful, but instead he is greeted by a man in a dress, bubbly personality, and fits the most grating stereotype of a homosexual. He screams and rages against God, who lists all the times he assaulted gays, protested against them, fought to keep them in the shadows, and laughed at their suicides. God then simply asks "Is this the behavior of a Christian?" Before the man answers no, and is sent to the abyss. I don't hate gays or feminists, which wasn't clear in the edit. I do hate myself though, probably more than Nazis to be honest. I feel pity for Nazis and their hateful ilk. I see people who have been so consumed by their hate that it's turned them into twisted mockeries of humans. Hate overrides logic, to the point that they will spend hours measuring their skulls and building elaborate conspiracies to justify their hate, even when those conspiracies don't make sense. I really can't muster up that much hate for them because they're just... Pathetic to me. Yes I stand against what they do, I vote and talk about how I feel in hopes of helping people stay away from them, but Nazis.... I just feel empty when they come around.

How deep is the GOP in with these types of people? https://www.kare11.com/article/news/local/republican-state-senator-accused-of-soliciting-minor-for-sex/89-b985afc4-77d5-4a28-bc54-946bd449e82c

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
om. feel like posting more cause already uploaded a bunch. so here. have a bonus post for funsies. also there are some people drunkenly? singing outside...
I definitely think we are in cahoots. all of the cahoots. and hoots. and baaa's apparently?
isnt it always?
oh. isnt this how you learn to do the things?
me with thousands of cards now... I will have them all!
please?
this new monitor has a speaker. so instead of sitting around in random discords I am like oh. I can take a break from my headset when its not certain times of the day. or night. er. yup.
... what. steal clothes? never. its not like I noticed and pointed out a pink shirt right away or *anything*... i mean was impressive considering...
oh shit its already almost spring. om. salty spicy spring time meow?
I actually just chilled during the moon thing that happened the other night. with my cat on my lap ofc. like he is rn.
om will be something other then pizza.
I just need better armor. shit I forgot about playing more kingdom come deliverance...
...in a certain spot...
with tomat soup plox.
hehe finally did the plague inc zombie one thing and mucus.
eh dont think I will go back to trauma therapy since its like. pandemic shut that down before and now its like. whole new slew of trauma yay!
made that mistake. now ima just gonna have fun for a bit. mweor.
dont ever let me help bake anything or this will happen.
delicious food things.
I am excite to play helldivers 2 again. will probably be dis friday since I am so distracted in so many other games. and still need to learn how to raft. def had much fun last friday night tho.
absolutely. plus its cute getting others to explain things and listen to their cute voice ramble on about it. I do dis a lot hehe.
I mean.
dis.
yup. I mean I know I can do the things and also what if I just make some machines do some of it for me. shit I have laundry in the dryer still. cant wait to move and get robot vacuum.
i mean I am by default hot so. doesnt matter that i might occasionally lose my mind right?
posture check.
I am just gonna be me. people expecting me to be a certain way can fuck all the way over there.
lmao very true.
I am so glad to have people that are able to have conversations and dont box me in and confine me to how they want to communicate exclusively.
or om. nah. I like my schedule rn.
mhmm.
*quietly moves some stuffies from one list to another* *adds even more omg. omg. omg. the one I just found tho* *falls down rabbit hole*
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! I am trying to get back into friday night gaming in my discord! all are welcome to join in and hang out. please do be respectful tho if we need coms for the games things. usually just hop in vc and once people start showing up we decide on what to play... Also steam spring sale so suggestions for others are welcome! games ideas: -helldivers 2 -dont starve together -aska (cause new updates) -heave ho (if we can get it working) -cooking games (plateup, overcooked 2, fast food simulator) -supermarket together (cause its free and fun) -unrailed -we need to go deeper -zombie games (left 4 dead, 7 days to die, dead island, state of decay 2) We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "Life is made up of desires that seem big and vital one minute, and little and absurd the next. I guess we get what's best for us in the end." - Alice Caldwell Rice I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Tuesday phone clearing positivity dump with some randoms sprinkled in
item.description:
I know this doesn't fit with the rest but it always makes me laugh.
This is beautiful
Sometimes it's okay to close yourself off from people who just want to always puke their problems on you.
Enjoy your plushies, buy that toy, wear that cartoon nostalgia t-shirt!
I think more people need to be told this last one instead of always being consoled and appeased for the sake of not upsetting further. To overcome some hardships you have to put in your own work and self reflection. Have a nice post-Paddy's day Tuesday!

item.title: Is Donald Trump a Russian Asset?
item.description: You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 1** [Flynn Thing](http://www.latimes.com/politics/la-na-pol-trump-flynn-comey-russia-timeline-2017-htmlstory.html) [Manafort Thing](http://thehill.com/blogs/blog-briefing-room/342509-new-book-devils-bargain-details-trump-lashing-out-at-manafort-days) [Tillerson Thing](https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2017/07/07/tillerson-says-trump-pressed-putin-on-russian-hacking-but-the-evidence-suggests-not-so-much/?utm_term=.e0ac214bd9bc) [Sessions Thing](http://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/did-trump-kushner-sessions-have-undisclosed-meeting-russian-n767096) [Kushner Thing](https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2017/jul/09/trump-russia-new-meeting-revealed-involving-donald-jr-kushner-and-manafort) [Wray Thing](http://www.latimes.com/opinion/opinion-la/la-ol-wray-russia-20170712-story.html) [Morgan, Lewis, & Bockius "Russian Law Firm of the Year" Thing](http://nypost.com/2017/05/12/trump-used-russia-law-firm-of-the-year-to-draft-letter-about-his-finances/) [Carter Page Thing](https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/fbi-has-questioned-trump-campaign-adviser-carter-page-at-length-in-russia-probe/2017/06/26/1a271dcc-5aa5-11e7-a9f6-7c3296387341_story.html?utm_term=.24d0b138db83) [Roger Stone Thing](http://www.politico.com/story/2017/07/14/roger-stone-house-testimony-postponed-240568) [Felix Sater Thing](http://www.newsweek.com/trump-russia-felix-sater-real-estate-632690) [Boris Epshteyn Thing](http://abcnews.go.com/Politics/white-house-press-officer-boris-epshteyn-investigation-russia/story?id=47731166) [Rosneft Thing](https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2017/06/08/trump-new-fbi-director-chris-wray-russian-ties-rosneft-gazprom-column/102603214/) [Gazprom Thing (see above)](http://dailycaller.com/2016/03/30/trumps-energy-adviser-is-personally-invested-in-gazprom/) [Sergey Gorkov banker Thing](http://www.newsweek.com/sergey-gorkov-grad-russian-banker-kushner-617422) [Azerbaijan Thing](http://www.newyorker.com/news/news-desk/senators-ask-for-an-investigation-into-trump-dealings-in-azerbaijan) You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 2** ["I Love Putin" Thing]( http://www.cnn.com/interactive/2017/03/politics/trump-putin-russia-timeline/) [Lavrov Thing]( https://www.vox.com/world/2017/6/27/15875434/sergey-kislyak-trump-russia-return-moscow) [Sergey Kislyak Thing]( https://www.vox.com/world/2017/6/27/15875434/sergey-kislyak-trump-russia-return-moscow) [Oval Office Thing]( https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/inside-the-oval-office-with-trump-and-the-russians-broad-smiles-and-loose-lips/2017/05/16/2e8b0d14-3a66-11e7-8854-21f359183e8c_story.html) [Gingrich Kislyak Phone Calls Thing]( http://www.palmerreport.com/politics/newt-gingrich-trump-russia-meetings/3504/) [Russian Business Interest Thing]( https://www.theatlantic.com/business/archive/2017/05/trump-lawyers-up-conflicts-of-interest/526185/) [Emoluments Clause Thing]( https://www.washingtonpost.com/investigations/dc-and-marylands-lawsuit-trump-flagrantly-violating-emoluments-clause/2017/06/12/8a9806a8-4f9b-11e7-be25-3a519335381c_story.html) [Alex Schnaider Thing]( http://theweek.com/speedreads/699538/russian-bank-directly-linked-putin-helped-finance-trump-hotel) [Hack of the DNC Thing]( http://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2017/jul/5/dnc-email-server-most-wanted-evidence-for-russia-i/) [Guccifer 2.0 Thing]( https://theintercept.com/2017/07/14/just-six-days-after-trump-jr-s-meeting-guccifer-2-0-emailed-me-but-there-was-one-key-difference/) [Mike Pence "I don't know anything" Thing](https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2017/05/18/mike-pence-insists-he-didnt-know-flynn-under-investigation-turkey-lobbying/101831354/) [Russians Mysteriously Dying Thing](http://www.cnn.com/videos/politics/2017/03/31/eight-prominent-russians-dead-since-us-elections-labott-dnt-erin.cnn) [Trump's public request to Russia to hack Hillary's email Thing](https://www.nytimes.com/2016/07/28/us/politics/donald-trump-russia-clinton-emails.html) You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 3** [The Trump email server that regularly communicated with a IP address from Russian Alfa Bank thing](https://www.newyorker.com/magazine/2018/10/15/was-there-a-connection-between-a-russian-bank-and-the-trump-campaign) [Trump house sale for $100 million at the bottom of the housing bust to the Russian fertilizer king Thing](http://www.miamiherald.com/news/business/article135187364.html) [Russian fertilizer king's plane showing up in Concord, NC during Trump rally campaign Thing](http://www.charlotteobserver.com/news/politics-government/article137881768.html) [Nunes sudden flight to the White House in the night Thing](http://www.businessinsider.com/nunes-white-house-grounds-trump-surveillance-2017-3) [Nunes personal investments in the Russian winery Thing](http://www.business2community.com/government-politics/devin-nunes-invested-california-wine-company-business-ties-russia-fact-check-01809651#ilwFvHKSgDxcmIOQ.97) [The create a joint cyber defense agreement with Russia Thing](https://techcrunch.com/2018/07/16/trump-putin-joint-cybersecurity-group/) [Cyprus bank Thing](https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2017/mar/23/wilbur-ross-russian-deal-bank-of-cyprus-donald-trump-commerce-secretary) [Trump not Releasing his Tax Returns Thing](http://www.cnn.com/2017/04/18/politics/trump-taxes-tax-returns/index.html) [The Republican Party's rejection of an amendment to require Trump to show his taxes thing]( http://thehill.com/policy/finance/326220-republicans-vote-to-block-resolutions-on-trumps-tax-returns) [Election Hacking Thing]( http://time.com/4828306/russian-hacking-election-widespread-private-data/) [GOP platform change to the Ukraine Thing](http://talkingpointsmemo.com/dc/jd-gordon-change-story-gop-platform-ukraine-amendment) [Steele Dossier Thing](http://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2017/jul/16/donald-trump-jrs-meeting-with-russians-undermines-/) [Sally Yates Can't Testify Thing](https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/trump-administration-sought-to-block-sally-yates-from-testifying-to-congress-on-russia/2017/03/28/82b73e18-13b4-11e7-9e4f-09aa75d3ec57_story.html) [Intelligence Community's Investigative Reports Thing](http://www.motherjones.com/politics/2017/01/read-us-intelligence-report-russian-hacking-2016-campaign/) You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 4** [Trump reassurance that the Russian connection is all "fake news" Thing](https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2017/7/11/15953640/donald-trump-twitter-mocked-russia-collusion) [Chaffetz not willing to start an Investigation Thing](http://www.vanityfair.com/news/2017/04/why-is-jason-chaffetz-resigning) [Chaffetz suddenly deciding to go back to private life in the middle of an investigation Thing](http://www.vanityfair.com/news/2017/04/why-is-jason-chaffetz-resigning) [Appointment of Pam Bondi who was bribed by Trump in the Trump University scandal appointed to head the investigation Thing](http://www.washingtonexaminer.com/report-florida-ethics-panel-clears-pam-bondi-over-trump-contribution/article/2620970) [The White House going into cover-up mode, refusing to turn over the documents related to the hiring and firing of Flynn Thing](http://thehill.com/policy/national-security/330410-white-house-rejects-oversight-request-for-flynn-documents) [Chaffetz and White House blaming the poor vetting of Flynn on Obama Thing](https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2017/05/trump-flynn/525816/) [Poland and British intelligence gave information regarding the hacking back in 2015 to Paul Ryan and he didn't do anything Thing](http://thehill.com/policy/national-security/intelligence/328718-uk-spies-first-saw-trump-russia-ties-report) [Agent M16 following the money thing](http://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/richard-dearlove-mi6-trump-russia-money-2008-financial-crisis-us-election-a7684341.html) [Trump team KNEW about Flynn's involvement but hired him anyway Thing](https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/2017/05/17/report-trump-team-knew-flynn-being-investigated/101816334/) [Let's Fire Comey Thing](http://www.npr.org/2017/05/10/527744909/suspicious-timing-and-convenient-reasoning-for-trumps-firing-of-comey) [Election night Russian trademark gifts Things](https://www.nytimes.com/2017/06/18/us/politics/russia-trump-trademarks.html) [Russian diplomatic compound electronic equipment destruction Thing](http://www.cbsnews.com/news/russians-destroyed-and-removed-material-from-shuttered-compounds-officials-say/) You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 5** [Let's give back the diplomatic compounds back to the Russians Thing](https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/trump-administration-moves-to-return-russian-compounds-in-maryland-and-new-york/2017/05/31/3c4778d2-4616-11e7-98cd-af64b4fe2dfc_story.html?utm_term=.9f251823e6ad) [Let's Back Away From Cuba Thing](https://qz.com/1007416/donald-trumps-cuba-trade-and-travel-roll-back-is-another-gift-to-russia/) [Donny Jr met with Russians Thing](https://www.aol.com/article/news/2017/07/18/trump-voters-dont-believe-don-jr-met-russian-lawyer/23036294/) [Donny Jr emails details "Russian Government's support for Trump" Thing](https://www.vox.com/2017/7/11/15953204/donald-trump-jr-emails-russia) [Trump's secret second meeting with his boss Putin Thing](http://www.reuters.com/article/us-usa-trump-russia-putin-idUSKBN1A32H5) [Secret meeting between former high commissioner Alexander Downer and Trump adviser George Papadopoulos when Papadopoulos told Downer that Russia had political dirt on Hillary Clinton Thing](https://www.buzzfeed.com/markdistefano/downer-papadopolous-trump-mueller-russia) [Erik Prince Seychelles Russia backchannel meeting thing](https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/blackwater-founder-held-secret-seychelles-meeting-to-establish-trump-putin-back-channel/2017/04/03/95908a08-1648-11e7-ada0-1489b735b3a3_story.html?utm_term=.2ded0bfdc5a9) [Trump tweet admitting Russia helped get him elected Thing](https://www.vox.com/2019/5/30/18645526/trump-russia-elected-help-twitter) [Ukraine halting their investigation into Manafort and their cooperation with the Mueller probe right after an arms deal was negotiated thing](https://www.nytimes.com/2018/05/02/world/europe/ukraine-mueller-manafort-missiles.html) [The many Russian nationals with prime seats at the inauguration and exclusive national prayer breakfast thing]( https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/special-counsel-eyeing-russians-granted-unusual-access-trump/story?id=56232847) You know, there's pretty much no evidence that Trump has ties to Russia, except for the... **PART 6** [Trump Media saved in 2022 by Russian-American under criminal investigation thing]( https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2024/apr/03/trump-media-es-family-trust-2022-loans) [Trump secretly sent covid tests to Putin during 2020 shortage thing]( https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/10/08/bob-woodward-new-book-war-trump-putin-biden/) [Trump Secretly Stayed in Touch With Putin After Leaving Office, Book Says thing]( https://www.nytimes.com/2024/10/08/us/politics/trump-putin-woodward-book.html?unlocked_article_code=1.Qk4.RGWr.7hs1WoiuwtyR&smid=nytcore-ios-share&referringSource=articleShare) [Handing over strategic Syrian bases to the Russians thing](https://thehill.com/policy/defense/465952-five-unintended-consequences-of-trumps-syria-withdrawal/) [Russian ambassador told Moscow that Kushner wanted secret communications channel with Kremlin thing]( https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/national-security/russian-ambassador-told-moscow-that-kushner-wanted-secret-communications-channel-with-kremlin/2017/05/26/520a14b4-422d-11e7-9869-bac8b446820a_story.html) [Trump and Vance ambush Zelensky in the Oval Office using Russian Propaganda](https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/archive/2025/02/ukraine-us-relations-trump/681880/) [Trump says he would encourage Russia to ‘do whatever the hell they want’ to any NATO country that doesn’t pay enough](https://www.cnn.com/2024/02/10/politics/trump-russia-nato/index.html) [The Trump administration is negotiating the return of more Russian diplomats to the United States. Some are likely to be spies.]( https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/09/us/politics/russia-spies-diplomats.html)
item.dc:creator: Dryne

item.title: I made a single line font with reverse scaling legibility
item.description: Edit: If anyone is interested in getting this font, I am going to link it on my IG account once I get it uploaded. https://www.instagram.com/tfoust10?igsh=ZGV2MGwwbXA2ZHF3
item.dc:creator: tfoust10

item.title: This dude scares me
item.description: "IF YOU BRING UP MY PAST, YOU SHOULD KNOW THAT JESUS DROPPED THE CHARGES" Am I wrong for being worried about the people in those dude's life? Or is it just me projecting my own issues with religious people doing horrible shit to me and then claiming they're forgiven.

item.title: Memes vol 528 Musicals
item.description:
Everything in this picture is amazing
This picture is INSANE
This is sending me it’s so funny- the screenshot of the TikTok is the best
Ponyboy what are you doing
I would have thrown myself on him
West Side Story 2021
Starkid
Spring Awakening
Heathers
I LOVE YOU BERNADETTE
Liza Jane tax
Froggy, Scruffy, and Nessie tax https://imgur.com/gallery/dw6rlaf X-men https://imgur.com/gallery/bgJ56kH

item.title: Look! What Bunny mom is doing to warm up her kits.
item.dc:creator: mariadmccormick

item.title: Memes for the insane.
item.description:
Yeah too hell with basic revenge plots, psychological torture is the way to go.
Sooo, what happens when they eat the super pellet?
I CRUST come up with a good pun for this.
As someone who's favorite animals to exist are dinosaurs, I approve.
Let's just hope they don't go back in time to the first Thanksgiving to get turkeys off the menu, that's right, go back in time to the first thanksgiving to get turkeys off the menu!
It doesn't sound real and the food doesn't look edible.
Look, I could actually see this working.
This pleases the OSHA handbook.
I have nothing to add to this post it's already perfect.
I gotta say I kinda agree with Ultron, he's also just kind of one of the coolest marvel villians, shame they didn't do too much with him though.
I really want to know what the game is now, but it'd feel disrespectful to this guy to play it.
Well that's all for this week, hope you enjoyed the memes, get plenty of sleep, remember to hydrate, and most importantly have a wonderful day!
item.dc:creator: KidKrominator
